resultList.dtldesc: Located in the well-connected neighbourhood of Poonamallee, this thoughtfully designed G+1 independent villa offers a comfortable and practical living space ideal for families. Built on a 1836 sq. ft layout, the property features separate living arrangements on both floors, making it suitable for joint families or rental income opportunities. The villa is Vaastu compliant with an East-facing entrance and enjoys good public transport connectivity with bus and upcoming metro access within around 200 metres.::::::::Property Specifications::::::::The villa is spread across Ground Floor and First Floor connected through external stairs. The ground floor comprises 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, while the first floor also includes 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. The property is unfurnished and comes with essential electrical fittings such as lights and fans. Flooring throughout the villa, including the master bedroom, is finished with vitrified tiles.::::::::The kitchen is a standard kitchen with a granite platform and stone sink. There is no piped gas connection available. The living area also includes a dedicated pooja room/pooja space. The villa does not have balconies, though there is a small open space at the entrance.::::::::The bathrooms include both Indian and Western style fittings. One bathroom is attached to the bedroom while the other serves as a common bathroom connected to the hall/living area. Geysers and shower fittings are installed, though there are no separate shower cubicles. The property also includes inverter backup for basic power usage.::::::::Facilities::::::::The villa provides parking space measuring approximately 10 ft × 11 ft suitable for covered or open parking. There are no society amenities such as clubhouse or swimming pool, and no dedicated security or CCTV facilities are available. The home is designed for practical independent living with essential conveniences in place.::::::::Locality::::::::The property enjoys excellent connectivity and access to daily conveniences in and around Poonamallee. Nearby educational institutions include Pioneer Matric Hr. Sec. School, Narayana eTechno CBSE School, and St. Joseph's Matriculation Higher Secondary School. Healthcare facilities nearby include Be Well Hospitals Poonamallee, Mangalam Multi-Speciality Hospital, and Dr Mehta's Hospitals Global Campus.::::::::For shopping and daily needs, residents have access to Indian Super Market, Haneefa Super Market, Fruit Market, Nexus Vijaya Mall, and Safa Square Commercial Complex. Public transport connectivity is excellent with Poonamallee Bus Stand and Iyyappanthangal Bus Stand nearby. Upcoming metro connectivity through Poonamallee Metro Station, Iyyappanthangal Metro Station, and Kattupakkam Metro Station further enhances accessibility across Chennai.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience modern and comfortable living with this well planned 2 BHK apartment available for sale in Urbanrise Revolution One, Padur, Chennai. The area offers excellent access to educational institutions, healthcare centres, supermarkets, and entertainment facilities.The apartment is located near Chettinad Hospital and benefits from strong connectivity to OMR and surrounding commercial zones. Its strategic location and rapid infrastructure growth continue to attract both homebuyers and investors.

resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::::This premium 3 BHK multistorey apartment is available for sale in Egmore Chennai and offers a luxurious and comfortable lifestyle in one of the prime residential areas of the city. The apartment is situated on the 7th floor and is sparingly used with excellent maintenance by the owner. This semi furnished property is thoughtfully designed with modern interiors quality fittings and spacious living areas making it ideal for families seeking a premium urban residence. The apartment is vastu compliant with a north east facing main entrance that enhances positivity and harmonious living.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment features 3 spacious bedrooms with wardrobes and wooden flooring in all bedrooms while the living and dining areas are finished with elegant Italian marble flooring. The kitchen washrooms and balconies are fitted with vitrified tiles for durability and easy maintenance. The modular kitchen is fully equipped with cabinets chimney hob OTG microwave dishwasher washing machine and other modern appliances for convenience. The apartment is fully air conditioned with a VRV system and also includes geysers and quality electrical fixtures. There are 3 balconies attached to different areas of the apartment offering beautiful city views and natural ventilation. The property has 2 attached bathrooms and 1 common bathroom all designed in western style with modern fittings and shower cubicles. The living room includes a TV console with wooden wall cladding that enhances the premium appearance of the interiors.::::Facility::::The apartment offers 100 percent DG power backup along with one covered parking space and open guest parking facilities. The residential complex provides several lifestyle amenities including a clubhouse swimming pool library billiards room table tennis gym children play area and a walking track spread across more than one acre of landscaped gardens. Security services and CCTV surveillance are available throughout the complex ensuring safety and convenience for residents. The well maintained infrastructure and premium amenities make the property suitable for luxury living.::::Locality::::Located in Egmore Chennai the apartment enjoys excellent connectivity to major commercial and residential hubs of the city. Reputed educational institutions such as St Don Bosco School and Ethiraj College are located nearby. Shopping and entertainment destinations including Express Mall Spencer Mall and Alsa Mall are easily accessible from the property. Healthcare facilities such as Apollo Hospital along with premium hotels including Radisson and Taj Connemara are situated close by. Thousand Lights and LIC Metro Stations are located within approximately 1 km providing smooth connectivity across Chennai. The locality also offers excellent public transport access and close proximity to markets restaurants and major city conveniences making this property an exceptional residential choice.
